subcodes.first_line: O thou who uttereth praise of the Glorious Beauty! Adorn thy tongue with glorification of His Gracious Presence, Who in this mighty age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای جمال ذوالجلال لسانرا بستایش حضرت منان مزین کن که در این عصر مجید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @Manifestation of God as sun
